flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Harding University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.2k → $26.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Harding University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.2k → $26.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Harding University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
